title: Workspace-Comms /registry/register Contract
description: SSOT JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) for POST /registry/register — the workspace<->platform registration handshake. Promoted from the descriptive workspace-comms/registry-contract.md into machine-enforced schema, DERIVED FROM THE WIRE AUTHORITY: molecule-core workspace-server/internal/models/workspace.go (`RegisterPayload`) and internal/handlers/registry.go (the `gin.H` response built at the end of Register). The instance models BOTH directions: `request` = RegisterPayload, `response` = the registration result. Field requiredness mirrors the Go struct binding tags exactly (`binding:"required"` -> required; `,omitempty` -> optional). The agent_card shape is the minimal shared sub-shape (see agent-card.schema.json); it is inlined under $defs/agentCard so this schema validates offline with no external $ref resolution (the CI gate runs check-jsonschema per file). Notes: `url` is conditionally required for push delivery, but the producer enforces that conditionally against the resolved delivery mode (payload || row || default push), so it is NOT statically required here. `kind=platform` is accepted on the wire but the producer 403s it on the public path (install-path-only).

request.description: RegisterPayload — the body the workspace runtime POSTs to /registry/register. Mirrors models.RegisterPayload.

id.description: Workspace id (self). `binding:"required"`. The bearer token (minted in the response on first register) is strictly bound to this id thereafter (C18 / #761).

url.description: Inbound A2A endpoint URL. Required for push-mode workspaces (the handler enforces this conditionally against the resolved delivery_mode); optional/unused for poll-mode. SSRF-validated by the producer (validateAgentURL). NOT statically required — hence omitted from `required`.

agent_card.description: The workspace's A2A agent card. `binding:"required"`. On the wire it is json.RawMessage (untyped); this contract pins only the minimal shared sub-shape (required `name`).

delivery_mode.description: Optional (`,omitempty`). Empty/absent means "keep the row's existing value, or default to push for new rows". When set, must be push|poll (models.IsValidDeliveryMode; empty is not valid here — the handler resolves the default before validating).

kind.description: Optional (`,omitempty`). Empty/absent means "keep existing, or default to workspace". `platform` marks the org concierge and is accepted on the wire but 403'd on the public register path (assignable only by the platform-agent install path); it additionally requires parent_id IS NULL and org-singleton.

mcp_server_present.description: Optional (`,omitempty`; *bool on the wire so absent=nil is distinguishable from false). Runtime's declaration that the baked /opt/molecule-mcp-server management MCP is present. For kind=platform the producer treats nil/false as fail-closed (RCA #2970). Non-platform workspaces may omit it.

response.description: The registration result (gin.H) returned by the Register handler on HTTP 200. `auth_token` is minted ONCE (first register / token-less legacy bootstrap) and omitted on re-register; `platform_inbound_secret` is delivered on (almost) every call (lazy-healed) and re-populates /configs/.platform_inbound_secret for volume-less SaaS workspaces (RFC #2312).

status.description: Always the literal "registered" on a successful 200 (gin.H{"status": "registered", ...}).

delivery_mode.description: The EFFECTIVE resolved delivery mode for the workspace after this register (effectiveMode).

auth_token.description: Optional. The workspace bearer, minted ONCE on first registration (or token-less legacy bootstrap) and persisted client-side at <configs>/.auth_token (0600). Absent on re-registration. This is the ONLY mint path for the outbound token.

platform_inbound_secret.description: Optional (present whenever the lazy-heal read/mint succeeds). The shared secret the producer signs proxied inbound A2A with; the workspace writes it to /configs/.platform_inbound_secret. Delivered here and on every heartbeat (the only delivery path for volume-less SaaS).

agentCard.$comment: Minimal shared agent-card sub-shape, kept in lockstep with agent-card.schema.json (the canonical standalone declaration). Inlined here so this schema validates offline without external $ref resolution.

name.description: Human/agent display name. The single required card field.

url.description: Optional advertised A2A URL; SSRF-validated by the producer when present.
